cadence_note: No published release calendar. Standard Eurobarometer runs two waves a year (spring and autumn, per https://europa.eu/eurobarometer/series/4961); Special and Flash waves are published irregularly throughout the year as their fieldwork completes. The open-data workbooks appear on data.europa.eu weeks-to-months after fieldwork, so a monthly full re-pull comfortably outpaces the source. (inferred - no published cadence)
